arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals he's questioned Man Utd position and denies Sir Jim Ratcliffe theory
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wanted to wait until the end of this season before swapping Sporting Lisbon for Manchester United but he was convinced after talks with INEOS and arrived in November

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Everton: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without Amad Diallo, Lisandro Martínez, Kobbie Mainoo and Manuel Ugarte vs. Everton.

arts.ttl: Former Man United ace Angel Gomes major transfer decision announced amid expiring Lille contract
arts.sum: Former Manchester United midfielder Angel Gomes is set to become a free agent in the summer with a string of clubs likely to chase his signature

arts.ttl: Man Utd have 'more problems than solutions' - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United currently have "more problems than solutions", says head coach Ruben Amorim as his side prepares to face rejuvenated Everton.

arts.ttl: How Sir Jim Ratcliffe could be 'forced' into Man United sale by the Glazers
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe completed his minority purchase of the club in February 2024
